intro: Hidden beneath the island's overgrowth, you find a weathered treasure chest.
title: Faraway Island Treasure
description: A forgotten chest rests where few people have ever set foot. Whatever is inside feels worth the journey.

1.label: Open It
1.selected: The chest opens with a soft click.$Inside is something extraordinary.

2.label: Leave It
2.selected: You leave the chest behind and continue across the island.
